principle: Every top-level domain declares purpose, center surface, primary objects, capabilities, proof, and what to avoid before UI work is treated as real.

depth_rule.native_edges: Darker and stable: global domains, durable state, admin.
depth_rule.workspace_overlays: Most translucent: temporary controls over the active workbench.
depth_rule.center: Dominant and task-shaped: preview, inbox, graph, canvas, prompt, source board, or environment gate depending on domain.

sites.label: Sites
sites.purpose: Manage the portfolio and every individual site from intent through build, proof, deploy, and learning.
sites.center_surface: Live site/page preview remains dominant while site, page, meta, media, template, run, and proof lanes expose the selected job.
avoid: fixed tools unrelated to the selected object
tool panels competing with the selected job

brainstorm.label: Brainstorm
brainstorm.purpose: Capture raw ideas before they become plans, sites, research tasks, or parked context.
brainstorm.center_surface: Idea inbox with triage, merge, reject, park, and promote lanes.
avoid: letting raw ideas become a fifth active plan

plans.label: Plans
plans.purpose: Explain why work exists, what it unlocks, what blocks it, and what proof closes it.
plans.center_surface: Registry, dependency, task, run, approval, and proof graph anchored to the four active parent plans.
avoid: parallel plan documents that bypass the registry

components.label: Components
components.purpose: Create, adapt, test, version, and promote reusable UI/component systems.
components.center_surface: Component canvas with variants, states, responsive views, usage proof, dependency checks, and promotion gates.
avoid: library cards without a working canvas
promoting shared UI without usage proof

media.label: Media Studio
media.purpose: Create site media: images, video, logos, brand assets, backgrounds, prompt blueprints, upscales, and edited canvases.
media.center_surface: Prompt-first creation surface with mode-specific controls and reference inputs; queue, results, library, and usage proof remain supporting surfaces.
avoid: making library browsing the whole workspace

research.label: Research
research.purpose: Answer capability, design, market, technical, and contradiction questions with evidence that can be promoted into memory.
research.center_surface: Source board with question, sources, claims, contradictions, synthesis, and promotion packet.
avoid: research notes that do not become decisions, gaps, or tasks

admin.label: Admin
admin.purpose: Operate the system: keys, deploy targets, capability manifest, launchd health, route smoke tests, and controlled environment changes.
admin.center_surface: Environment and guardrail board with health, auth, domains, smoke tests, rollback, exports, and hard-stop approvals.
